stories.headline: Dog rescued from Ben Nevis suspected to have eaten discarded cannabis
stories.description: Tokyo the black Labrador collapsed half way up the UK's highest mountain during a hike with her owner.

stories.headline: Nothing to suggest Ann Widdecombe killing was politically motivated, police say
stories.description: Devon and Cornwall Police are not looking for anyone else in connection with her death.

stories.headline: Key moments from former Qatar Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani’s life
stories.description: Sheikh Hamad’s 18-year rule catapulted Qatar to prosperity and reshaped its domestic, regional and global footprint.

stories.headline: Child killed in lorry collision in Chipping Ongar, Essex
stories.description: Detectives are appealing for any witnesses to get in touch.
